provider_source.source_of_truth_boundary: AOF normalized session record is canonical.

event_summaries.summary: User reported that v7-v9 releases were internally auditable but product value was not understandable.
Runtime selected v9.1 Product Value Comprehension Gate instead of continuing directly to provider production-boundary work.
AOF runtime opened TASK-111, generated product value evidence, and audited the value evidence chain.
Product value evidence schemas, commands, Mission Control projection, release-state gate, docs, and runtime proof artifacts were written.
Focused tests cover positive product value evidence and negative unclear-understanding-without-escalation failure.
No runtime blocker remains for v9.1; broad user validation and market value remain explicitly not proven.
Stop if product value evidence is overclaimed as market adoption, broad user satisfaction, semantic correctness, or production provider safety.

risk_candidates: Self-hosting understanding evidence can be mistaken for broad user validation.
decision_candidates: Promote product value evidence to release-state gate for v9.1+.

redaction_boundary: Summaries only; no private prompt bodies or secrets exported.
release_ready_boundary: Release readiness is runtime evidence, not market proof.
not_proven: Session export does not prove broad user understanding, semantic truth, market value, or production provider safety.
